name: MEMC Electronic Materials, Inc.
description: MEMC Electronic Materials, Inc., later rebranded as SunEdison, Inc., was a prominent global manufacturer of silicon wafers for the semiconductor industry and a major developer of renewable energy projects. Founded in 1959, the company specialized in producing high-purity polysilicon and monocrystalline silicon wafers, which served as the fundamental building blocks for microelectronic applications. Headquartered in the United States, the firm eventually transitioned its focus toward solar energy development, construction, and operation before undergoing significant corporate restructuring and bankruptcy proceedings in the mid-2010s. It remains recognized for its historical leadership in semiconductor materials technology.
